address.Address: Near Shiv Mandir, Raipur Rd, Raipur, Dehradun, Uttarakhand

address.streetAddress: Near Shiv Mandir, Raipur Rd, Raipur, Dehradun, Uttarakhand

itemListElement.reviewBody:
WORST!!! WORST !!! WORST !!!

Short Answer :

If you want to save your time just leave the whole answer and never think about this school again and if you want trade off for your Future, Carrier, Money and Time then this school welcomes you !!!

You will feel lack of :-

Quality Education
Food and Water
Productive Ambience
Long Answer :

This is one of the more than worst school in the World along with the ego of board that has a tepid and suffocating environment.

Extract of Review : Fake, Moron, Clodhopper ,Obnoxious and Numskull school , Fake, Moron, Clodhopper, Obnoxious and Numskull school.....Duffers

[It's true that Students makes the school but if and only if other remaining criteria are successfully filled.Like one flower can not make the garden same goes for institution.]

Introduction :

It is a Tier-4 ,below-average school  of CBSE (CENTRAL BOARD OF SECONDARY EDUCATION ) situated in regions of raipur dehradun and comes wit tag of private school  of our country  .Now ,What actually you can accept from CBSE!! ,you can accept that same from this school i.e. No Quality Education System, No Proper Management, No proper Schedule, No Timetable ,No extra Co-curricular activities ,No Exposures and the list goes on. This was the list of NO's and the list of YES has only one sentence - This school is gonna ruin your life totally and devastate your inner soul and peace in your life. You can actually call it a sibling of samarjeet singh.

The system in this school is puzzled, weird and hectic. The workload in this school is very high, which is actually of no advantage and hence counted as burden. There are no proper checking in exams (it is obvious as b'coz copies go to samarjeet singh and school itself is not great ,get shocked !! why not its nightmare for students), what you accept you cann't get. The work related to academics can be given to you at you any time even at night and in holidays and can be called that you have to submit it within two days, without providing enough time to complete the work and that's not the end, the bad part is that you can even get more than one subject work in single day and you have to complete all that work in short time and this makes harder to get the time for self study and dude you will die like how I died for two while preparing for jee advanced. The rates of backlog is also very high as no proper checking is done and there is no transparency ,only they want to fill their pockets.

If you get some work regarding academics, then that day your nightmare becomes true as you will find almost no one in the admin block and even if by chance, you find a single person in admin(maybe he will be a chaprasi ( peon ) , who got that post on lease), he/she will have that much ego & attitude (as they are on the highest official post ,although bit of locals are helpful but one flower can not make the garden !) that you may think for What reason you joined this school???

The only thing (which is also a disadvantage, you will see later on) is that fees too much high with 0/🥚  facilities ( or even I will rate them as negative) as compared to other schools  (but this school always provide the fees notice first than other necessary works and many times it only provide fees notice and no notice regarding something important, related to career development of student) but after getting admitted in this school you might think that the fees which you are paying is also very high as compared to the facilities, condition and working system of the school (yes you got it right, the school administration do almost no work), it's better to go in , a dummy school for jee advanced prep or any other school ,other school s are also not super perfect and they too have hidden dark secrets, everyone has some flaws but still, they are far better than one for which you are reading the review and you can even go to other good school s and dummy  school s which atleast hear you and guide you positively & properly. If you think you will become atleast an 'student  or a school grad then Dude, you are in the wrong train b'coz this school kills the every single bit of self-esteem inside you.

And yes, if you are thinking that someone(any school representative) has told that he/she will help you in school related work(Imagine), then just wait and watch, first days will pass, then weeks will pass, then months will pass and no no don't worry till it comes to years, the date of doing the work(important for your career) will pass and the person who was helping you will have some words like,"school/rana is not allowing......" ,"school/rana  gave no notice regarding this. regarding that....." and blah blah blah.... and at last you find yourself in middle of nowhere, you have to go back and then start again as you know you have to clear this school for making your future (if you are a student who knows, How much hardwork your Parents are doing for you and how much hardwork you yourself are doing to get over this fake school).

You will be happy that you have got this school from science background but that's not true ,the Secret is that you can even get this school without passing 10th compartment in science subjects  exam (Shocking Nah, But don't worry this school have many many untold secrets). Besides this everything in this school and in the cbse is biased. As situated in hilly  area, the internal politics of village and school is common which again hampers a development cycle of students.

The school is located in town hilly area as many schools are but here the problem is that you have to do up-hilling and down-hilling to travel to this school  ( as this school is in a gully ) whether you live in Hostel and yes, this school do not have any  Proper Working security Cams, Proper Canteens, Guards etc etc.

Admission :

School uses lots of Ninja technique to trap the students here. Admission are in transient phase here and spot  lateral entry are the top processes that fills the mass here. After admission it only nine days wonder.

School Life :

Horrible and Pathetic or say HELL in a CELL. GIGO - Garbage in, Garbage Out.

Academics/Curriculum :

You will miss the lot and lots of things to learn and discover(great thanks goes to this college and cbse for providing such substandard education). Curriculum is unscheduled and unfixed. Anything can happen at anytime. The management and administration is zilch here.Great thanks goes to this school for providing and making most students as jobless and unsuccessful 'graduates' to serve their country.Forget about extra co curricular activities. School itself has no Academic Calendar ,it follows only one that comes from samarjeet singh and it too comes with tag of Tentative ,now all the things are self-explanatory ,there is no strategic planning for development of ward just somehow they just want to pass the sessions.

Labs and Equipment :

Most of them here are only for audits as it should qualify the minimum standards to maintain the tag of cbse school.

School Fees :

Less than some renowned Private school s like dps and all schools but it would be great if it comes with reduced number of zeros at end.

Hostel Life/ Day-Scholar's Life :

Hostel Life has separate significance in school life but here it is Survival Series. As school itself is not too old, then you can expect the rooms with average conditions but quality of mess food remains the unbiased champion i.e. sometimes you can even differentiate the components,ingredients of the stuff(what they call as 'food') they are providing, even after cooking!! As I am w day scholar can't say much 

. Life of Day-Scholars remains in between the business of school teachers. The condition of room and living environment for day scholar whether be good or bad but the owner eyes will be keen to look for their rent. (Ahh a Kind of Money Thirst in their Mind & Soul!! Everyone wants money but atleast they should provide the things for what you are paying.)

Location and people :

You will think, if nothing is good here then maybe people and location will be good but the turmoil here is that whether you are in Hostel/PG/Rent, most of person you will find are acquisitive, egoistic and ill-mannered, they doesn't even care about providing the basic facilities for which you are paying. And talking about location, you may think, you can consume time by lounging (Seriously!! 4 Yrs Roaming with no Aim, sounds spooky nah) but always remember travelling for 1-2 days or weeks for holidays is far different than living in such an region with such legendary aforesaid, it's a jeopardy deal.

Campus :

it would be disgraceful for the word 'Campus' here. The location of school is awkward but yupp, there is a famous viewpoint where you click pics of yourself with the magnificent view of mal devta (Which will make you happy and cheerful b'coz atleast your non-school/non-native friends will watch you in social media and will thought the guy is enjoying the life which is a dream of many). But believe this thing, the view of mal devta is among the scenic beauty but the thought of this school will not allow you feel the moment, it's absolutely better to see when you are not the part of this school.

Facilities Provided :

Nil is the number of facilities provided by this school.There is no medical facility, no recreational hall/Space  present inside the school . There is no canteen/shop inside school in which you can get lots of daily need stuffs but 0/🥚here  (can't complain for that as everyone want to buy the product from near-by  Shop ) and some canteens of local natives (which are providing the food, so you can survive here). school has  bus but mostly only for staff members.

Infrastructure :

Yeah, it is true that buildings are in good condition as compared to other schools institutions from outside, as said it is not too old . school haveno  Projectors in classes but they don't also have 'Smart Boards'(which are rarely used in meaningful purpose) in a separate room and flooring is covered with marble stone .And some of the departmental learning halls even don't get the rays of sun in winters which gives the feel of 'Ice Age'. But alone the better condition of buildings can't make the institution complete as most of the sectors of the college remains unproductive. (like the ambience they are providing for the novice to become an 'student'.)

Library :

A word used here is library 'not libraries' that narrate the whole story i.e. there is one single  library for whole school unlike any other school s where you can find  too many books at each block and even libraries at hostels but there is no such system in existence here and most of books are not updated from eras ,though Hindi and English newspapers are updated daily atleast they keep you updated and connected with the global scenarios.

Exposure :

Suffocating, the exposure of school is - ( minus) Infinity .One can't elaborate this topic much as in this school you will never heard this term. Once you get admitted here you will start thinking yourself as one of the most unluckiest person in this whole Cosmos and always think to get out of this Dead Zone.

Faculty/Pedagogy :

Can't say much about that ,it changes everytime (Only few are permanent but they enjoy their own perks). Only Cross the fingers to get the better teachers. Very Few are helpful but unfortunately everything is not in their hands.

Student Cell :

What's That !!! Never heard about that, Sorry for this, can't help here.

Culture :

School shares the same culture as other school s. Few Seniors are helpful and other just fall in the category of Seniors (you know what it means, roaming here and there like hobo) ,after getting admitted in any school you will be able to distinguish among both types of Seniors. Fresher Student start the year with down faces ( but as years grow up they are in the path to choose among the option of Good or Evil/Dipstick Seniors for their juniors.

Exams :

The result totally depends on your fate or on the hands of Examiner i.e. no matter what you have written, 15 thousand per month cbse examiner will only give marks according to their Wise-Blunt Head. The scenario is that the achiever can be a blooper and the blooper (kind of students who lounges) can be a achiever, yes, it's harsh true here. And talking about Unit/monthly Test termed as 'Sessional or Internal or Mid-Terms' here, has no fix time and schedule (Everything here is Unscheduled except the fees Notice) and it also depends on faculty or cbse .

Seminars/Fest :

Lets only see the 'Seminars', b'coz Fest here is only a dream (if there are then you are lucky & one can say CIESZYC/escalade,then probably it was for history books. Book fair ):-

As mentioned, it is private Level school then no  faculties makes a visit  it seems only a formality. Rarely, there will be different organizations to provide their seminars on their specialized fields. (This makes to feel as a lucky person because you can't think of such things here.)

Clubs/Societies :

Hardly, this school will have a full fledged functioning club, they got dissolve within 6 months or a year and if there are clubs then they are only in name, they also face the problem of funding.

Sports :

The situation is that after watching the sports' facility and faculty ,you yourself will forget the definition of Sports.

Peers Group :

Few students are good and productive (before this nightmare) but they are also in wait when this whirlpool of nuisance will end and the rest are just crowd. So, Peer Group totally depends on your Luck but the harsh trending truth is that the number of students taking admission here is decreasing annually.(As the students are now becoming aware of the facts).

Alumni Network :

It is in the under-development stage (you know what it means i.e. it doesn't exist) but it may took more other decade to do so. B'coz most of the alumni will be desperate to do their 12th  from here but happy to get out from this bog,if someone have good experience here then it is different case study.




Myths :

- Most of the freshers,locals and even seniors think that this school is good  because it mentions previous sessions they provide best schooling in top 10 india or uttrakhand I don't remember now ,which is actually completely not true because this school is good for nothing .

-  

- school will develop more in the upcoming years or in near future this analogy is also common in that crowd ,so the admission of candidate should be done in near future not now. See, nobody thinks that student had joined the school for its own growth and development (because student is admitting in learning organization, before serving to others student have to sharp its skills set ) ,to shape out its future. Yes it's true if you are in any organization you will also be the part of development cycle of that organization but that doesn't mean you are putting lots of extra efforts for development of organization and in return organization is just using you for their work.

- Here a short story if you go for admission here and if you ask the question from school staff or any local residence that :-

Aspirant : How is this school?

College staff /Local Residence : Fantastic ,Some students from here cleared UPSC or student of that batch cleared CDS or that student got in IIT and NITS.

[Now Aspirant is thinking.....Oh that's great maybe I will also become like that in future]

Aspirant : How is the working condition for nda/jee aspirants of the school ?

School Staff /Local Residence : Generally students get qualified here ,but it depends on type of student what student is doing here.

Just see , we see lots of students during admission when they are with their parents or guardians ,student at that time only seems to be innocent but after some years they got caught while taking injections or consuming alcohol.



Aspirant : [Just nodding head...]

So, Moral of this short story is that, as being a fresher they try to manipulate your mind as school staff wants your admission to run their business and for locals it is their livelihood. Whether Local residences knows about IITs and NITs or other school s or not ,but they still consider this school as best out of best. And some students are really at fantastic positions in their career but the whole credit does not goes to school if yes then they should also take care of students who are struggling in their own fields.

Note for readers :

Most of the school members are just passing the time here whether it be a student or faculty who are dedicated towards the goal. The remaining mass is combination of local mass (some of them are dedicated for their jobs and most of them does not care what is going here ,what they want is wages on time) and 'group of guys who does not know What actually they are doing next in their life'.

Actually the school is in top list of something, that is their 'Dark Secrets' ,which they made in such minimum time , every institution has its positives and negatives in some ratio but this school itself is in the negative aura.

Conclusion :

Now you know one of the school s which is eponymous for producing unskilled ,futile jobless 12th pass students for the country and world & caliber of this school is that any bright student can ruin its carrier here. Everything you can imagine about the worst situation ,happens here. And here is no one to listen your voice. If you want to join this school, then this numskull school will left no chance to ruin your carrier, future and your inner soul.

So, after this you know what are the brilliant benefits of this school and its totally your choice to take admission here and jeopardize your life . And if you take admission here please do not forget to share your great experience as you are always welcome.

Always remember if you are in dilemma, 'Whether to join this school or not' , then ,This school does not fit for so called private schools or any other different sort of course.
My Brother is studying in this school it is Best Boys Boarding School In Dehradun.
They don’t focus on students main focus is to earn money worst school
Wrost managment + zero academics + school is only fot money laundering🚮
My son is studying in this school  it is best in academics and boarding facilities. I 100% in recomend you  to enroll in this school .

Its not a good school they only give priority to the boarder and
I am student in their school this year we came 2nd in sfa turanament but they took me out from the group photo and posted in instagram .
Mere wajah sai to pura turnament jetai or mere he photo nhi dali well done saigrace 🙏👏
No rating for them only hates ...
No facilities, no academics.Just a money laundering system established by the horrible MD and his management. Highly not recommended
